name: linknest-app
description: LinkNest - A modern social media platform

scripts.build: npm ci --prefix backend && npm ci --prefix frontend --include=dev && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install-deps: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm test --prefix backend && npm test --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npm ci --prefix frontend --include=dev && npm run build --prefix frontend

author: LinkNest Team
